Commercial Asphalt Paving Services

Heavy-Duty Parking Lots & Commercial Asphalt Solutions

Professional commercial asphalt paving services in Central Ohio since 1999. From new parking lot construction to industrial paving, loading docks, and ADA compliance upgrades — we deliver durable, heavy-duty solutions with minimal business disruption. Licensed, insured, and built to handle your high-traffic needs.

26+ Years Experience
500+ Commercial Projects
4.5★ Google Rating
Get Free Estimate Call (740) 453-3063
Comprehensive Commercial Solutions

Our Commercial Asphalt Services

Complete commercial paving services designed to minimize downtime and maximize durability for your business.

01

New Parking Lot Construction

Professional construction of new commercial parking lots with heavy-duty base preparation, proper drainage, and ADA-compliant design to handle high traffic volumes.

  • Heavy-duty excavation & grading
  • Engineered base for load-bearing
  • 3-4" commercial-grade asphalt
  • ADA-compliant parking spaces
  • Professional line striping & marking
  • Drainage systems & catch basins
$2.75per sq ft · volume discounts available
Get Estimate
02

Parking Lot Renovation & Expansion

Complete renovation and expansion of existing parking lots with minimal business disruption — phased construction to keep your business operational.

  • Phased construction planning
  • Milling & resurfacing existing lots
  • Parking lot expansion
  • Base repair & reconstruction
  • Updated line striping & markings
  • Weekend & after-hours scheduling
$3.25per sq ft · includes milling
Get Estimate
03

Industrial & Heavy-Duty Paving

Extra-strength asphalt paving for loading docks, warehouse access, equipment pads, and truck routing areas — engineered to withstand heavy loads and frequent traffic.

  • Loading dock construction & repair
  • Warehouse access roads
  • Heavy equipment pads
  • Truck routing lanes & turnarounds
  • Reinforced base for heavy loads
  • High-strength asphalt mix design
$3.50per sq ft · heavy-duty rated
Get Estimate
04

Line Striping & ADA Compliance

Professional parking lot line striping, stall marking, directional arrows, and ADA compliance upgrades to keep your property safe, organized, and legally compliant.

  • Parking stall striping & numbering
  • Directional arrows & stop bars
  • ADA-compliant handicap spaces
  • Crosswalk & pedestrian markings
  • Fire lane & no parking zones
  • Reflective & thermoplastic options
Custompricing based on layout
Get Estimate
05

Commercial Maintenance & Repair

Preventative maintenance and repair services to extend the life of your commercial asphalt surfaces — crack sealing, sealcoating, patching, and pothole repair.

  • Crack sealing & filling
  • Sealcoating & surface protection
  • Pothole repair & patching
  • Surface milling & leveling
  • Drainage improvements
  • Scheduled maintenance programs
Variablebased on scope & condition
Get Estimate
06

Site Work & Grading

Complete site preparation, excavation, and grading services for commercial properties — from initial clearing to final drainage solutions.

  • Site clearing & demolition
  • Cut & fill grading
  • Storm water management
  • Catch basin & culvert installation
  • Retaining walls & erosion control
  • Final site preparation
Customproject-based pricing
Get Estimate
The Commercial Advantage

Why Businesses Choose Neff Paving

26+ years of commercial paving excellence across Central Ohio.

Minimal Business Disruption

We understand your business can't afford extended downtime. Our efficient crews work quickly with flexible scheduling — including nights and weekends — to keep your operations running smoothly.

Heavy-Duty Construction

Our commercial asphalt is engineered for high traffic and heavy loads — reinforced base preparation, premium materials, and expert installation built to last decades.

ADA Compliance Experts

We ensure your commercial property meets all ADA requirements — accessible parking spaces, compliant slopes, proper signage, and safe pathways for all visitors.

Phased Construction

Large projects are broken into manageable phases to maintain customer access and employee parking throughout construction — strategic planning minimizes impact on your business.

Commercial Experience

Over 500 commercial projects completed — from small retail centers to large industrial facilities. We understand the unique demands of commercial paving and deliver results that enhance property value.

Free Estimates

Comprehensive, itemized estimates with transparent pricing and no hidden fees. We provide detailed project proposals so you can make informed decisions for your business.

Simple & Professional

Our Commercial Paving Process

From site assessment to project completion — a clear, professional path to your new parking lot or commercial paving project.

1

Site Assessment

We visit your property to assess project scope, discuss business needs, and identify any ADA or drainage requirements.

2

Detailed Proposal

Receive a comprehensive, itemized quote including phasing plan, timeline, materials, and any necessary permits or approvals.

3

Scheduling & Planning

We work with you to schedule construction during off-peak hours or in phases to minimize disruption to your business operations.

4

Professional Installation

Our experienced commercial crews complete your project using heavy-duty equipment, premium materials, and proven techniques — on time and on budget.

5

Final Inspection

We conduct a thorough walkthrough, ensure all ADA requirements are met, verify line striping is accurate, and confirm your complete satisfaction.

Ready to Get Started?

Enhance Your Commercial Property Today

Join hundreds of satisfied Central Ohio businesses who trust Neff Paving for their commercial asphalt needs. Get your free, no-obligation estimate today.

✓ Heavy-duty construction
✓ Minimal business disruption
✓ ADA compliant

Most commercial estimates provided within 24 hours. We serve businesses across Zanesville, Columbus, Reynoldsburg, and all of Central Ohio.
